title: auto_learn: compute_file_relationships is O(N^2) SQLite INSERTs at session end
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Performance. Location: src/auto_learn.rs:319-338. Violation: N files = N*(N-1)/2 save_file_relationship DB calls. No batching, no transaction wrap. Refactor: wrap in single transaction, batch INSERTs, cap session_files_modified size.
